name: PreAxia Health Care Payment Systems Inc.
summary: PreAxia Health Care Payment Systems Inc. focuses on the development, distribution, marketing, and sale of health care payment processing services and products. It is developing an online access system creating a health spending account that allows card payments and processing services to third-party administrators, insurance companies, and others; and software systems for the issuing of health payment cards and financial transaction processing services. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Calgary, Canada.
